Karaka.—Jupiter is in his own house in an Upachaya
from Lagna and the second from Chandra Lagna aspected
by Venus. In the Navamsathe fourth lord and Vidyakarka
are in mutual kendras.
Conclusion. — Chart No 16 belongs to one of the
greatest poets of Europe of the eighteenth century. Mark
how the influences of Venus, Jupiter and Saturn have
blended together in relation to the house of learning and
how all these three planets have been strengthened either
by association or occupation of own house. The native of
the horoscope was also interested in astrology, philosophy,
art and metaphysical and mystical writings. The situation of
Jupiter in the fourth in the Navamsa and exalted Venus
aspecting the fourth are significant combinations
suggestive of the emotions that moulded the native's
poetical thoughts.

Concerning the Fourth House 191
Chart No. 80.—Born on 7-9-1856 at 4p.m. (L.M.T.) (Long.
5h. 10m. 20s. E., Lat. 13° N.)
Balance of Mercury Dasa at birth : Years 10-1-17.
